parameters.query:
SELECT id AS mailbox_id, email AS mailbox_email
FROM mailboxes
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY email;

INSERT INTO meetings (
  mailbox_id, provider_event_id, calendar_id, client_id,
  title, description, start_at, end_at, timezone, meeting_url, status
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.mailbox_id }}',
  '{{ $json.provider_event_id }}',
  'primary',
  {{ $json.client_id !== null ? "'" + $json.client_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.description || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.start_at ? "'" + $json.start_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.end_at   ? "'" + $json.end_at   + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.timezone }}',
  {{ $json.meeting_url ? "'" + $json.meeting_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.status }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (mailbox_id, calendar_id, provider_event_id) DO UPDATE
  SET client_id   = COALESCE(meetings.client_id, EXCLUDED.client_id),
      title       = EXCLUDED.title,
      description = EXCLUDED.description,
      start_at    = EXCLUDED.start_at,
      end_at      = EXCLUDED.end_at,
      timezone    = EXCLUDED.timezone,
      meeting_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.meeting_url, meetings.meeting_url),
      status      = EXCLUDED.status
RETURNING id AS meeting_id;

INSERT INTO meeting_attendees (meeting_id, email, full_name, response_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.meeting_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  CASE '{{ $json.response_status }}'
    WHEN 'needsAction' THEN 'needs_action'::public.attendee_response_status
    WHEN 'accepted'    THEN 'accepted'::public.attendee_response_status
    WHEN 'tentative'   THEN 'tentative'::public.attendee_response_status
    WHEN 'declined'    THEN 'declined'::public.attendee_response_status
    ELSE 'needs_action'::public.attendee_response_status
  END
)
ON CONFLICT (meeting_id, email) DO UPDATE
  SET full_name       = EXCLUDED.full_name,
      response_status = EXCLUDED.response_status;
